items.name: Roasted Butternut Squash Soup

items.name: Citrus Mint Splash
items.description: A refreshing blend of zesty citrus fruits and invigorating mint, served over ice for a cool and revitalizing drink.

items.description: A revitalizing blend of fresh mint, zesty lime, and sparkling water, served over ice for a crisp and refreshing mocktail.

items.description: A refreshing fusion of tangy citrus fruits and sweet, juicy berries, served over ice for a vibrant and revitalizing drink.

items.description: A tangy and refreshing blend of passion fruit and sparkling water, served chilled for a burst of tropical flavour.

items.name: Fizzy Grape Splash
items.description: A sparkling blend of juicy grapes and effervescent bubbles, served chilled for a crisp and refreshing experience.

items.name: Orange Fresca
items.description: A vibrant and refreshing mix of freshly squeezed oranges and a splash of sparkling water, served chilled for a crisp and lively burst of citrus.

items.name: Nutmeg Breeze
items.description: A smooth and spiced blend of nutmeg with a hint of sweetness, served chilled for a soothing and refreshing drink.

items.name: Strawberry Burst
items.description: A refreshing blend of ripe strawberries, banana, oats, creamy yogurt, and a hint of honey, pureed to perfection for a smooth, fruity treat.

items.name: Tropical Mango Bliss
items.description: A tropical blend of ripe mangoes, banana, oats, creamy yogurt, and a touch of honey, whipped into a velvety, refreshing drink.

items.name: Avocado Bliss
items.description: A creamy blend of ripe avocado, banana, oats, smooth yogurt, and a hint of honey, offering a rich and refreshing taste with a velvety texture.

items.name: Blueberry Burst
items.description: A vibrant mix of juicy blueberries, banana, oats, creamy yogurt, and a touch of honey, blended to create a refreshing and antioxidant-rich drink.

items.name: Tropical Coconut Dream
items.description: A refreshing blend of tender coconut pulp and creamy ice cream,topped with whipped cream for a tropical twist.

items.name: Guava Grove
items.description: A refreshing and tropical blend of ripe guava and creamy ice cream, finished with a touch of whipped cream.

items.name: Strawberry Serenade
items.description: Bursting with fresh strawberry flavor, this classic milkshake is sweet, fruity, and perfectly creamy.

items.name: Avocado Delight
items.description: Smooth and creamy, our avocado milkshake is rich in flavor and nutrients, a unique and delicious choice.

items.name: Belgian Chocolate Delight
items.description: Indulge in the rich, deep flavor of Belgian chocolate, perfectly balanced with creamy ice cream and a touch of whipped cream.

items.name: Peanut Butter Delight
items.description: A creamy, nutty delight, our peanut butter milkshake is perfect for peanut butter lovers, with a smooth and satisfying taste.

items.name: Café Espresso / Café Doppio
items.description: A rich, bold shot of our finest espresso, delivering intense flavor and a smooth, aromatic experience.

items.name: Café Americano
items.description: A smooth and robust espresso, delicately diluted with hot water for a rich, aromatic coffee experience.

items.name: Café Cappuccino
items.description: A perfect balance of rich espresso, steamed milk, and a velvety layer of milk foam, topped with a sprinkle of cocoa.

items.name: Café Latte
items.description: A creamy blend of rich espresso and steamed milk, finished with a light layer of froth for a smooth and comforting coffee experience.

items.name: Café Latte Variations
items.description: Cinnamon / Gourmet / Noisette / Irish / Caramel / Vanilla - A smooth and creamy latte infused with your choice of delicious flavors, creating a unique and delightful coffee experience.

items.name: Café Mocha
items.description: A luscious mix of rich espresso, velvety steamed milk, and indulgent chocolate syrup, topped with a light layer of whipped cream or froth.

items.name: Marocchino Bianco
items.description: A decadent blend of rich espresso, creamy steamed milk, and white chocolate, topped with a sprinkle of cocoa for a luxurious and indulgent coffee experience.

items.name: Hot Chocolate - White / Dark
items.description: Indulge in a velvety smooth hot chocolate made with your choice of rich, creamy white chocolate or decadent dark chocolate, topped with a swirl of whipped cream.

items.name: Café Bonbon
items.description: A delightful blend of rich espresso and sweetened condensed milk, creating a smooth and indulgent coffee treat.

items.name: Café Mexicano
items.description: A robust espresso blend with a hint of cinnamon and a touch of chocolate, creating a warm and spicy coffee experience.

items.name: Green Tea / Black Tea / Lemon Tea
items.description: Enjoy your choice of refreshing green tea, bold black tea, or zesty lemon tea, each crafted to offer a delightful experience.

items.name: Chilled Café Americano
items.description: A refreshing blend of rich double shot espresso and chilled water served over ice cubes. Perfectly invigorating for any time of the day.

items.name: Café Shakerato
items.description: Espresso shaken with ice and a touch of sweetness, served chilled and frothy for a refreshing treat.

items.name: Chilled Café Bonbon
items.description: A delightful mix of rich espresso and sweet condensed milk, served over ice for a creamy, indulgent experience.

items.name: Iced Café Mocha
items.description: A luscious blend of espresso, chocolate, and milk, served over ice for a cool and decadent treat.

items.name: Iced Café Irish
items.description: A smooth mix of espresso, Irish cream, and milk, served over ice for a refreshing and indulgent twist.

items.name: Iced Café Noisette
items.description: A delightful combination of espresso and hazelnut cream, served over ice for a nutty and refreshing experience.

items.name: Mocha Frost Frappe
items.description: A delightful mix of rich espresso, chocolate, and milk, served over ice and topped with velvety whipped cream.

items.name: Berry Frost Frappe
items.description: A refreshing blend of blueberry filling, rich coffee, and creamy milk, finished with a dollop of whipped cream.

items.name: Nutty Caramel Frappe
items.description: A creamy blend of caramel, rich coffee, hazel nut sauce and milk, finished with a swirl of whipped cream.

items.name: Classic Fudge Walnut Brownie
items.description: Indulge in our classic fudge walnut brownie, baked to perfection for a rich, gooey center with a crisp outer layer.

items.name: Vanilla Mango Panna Cotta
items.description: A luscious, tropical twist on the classic, featuring layers of creamy mango puree and vanilla panna cotta, topped with fresh mango compote.

items.name: Tiramisu
items.description: An irresistible melody of flavors featuring layers of delicate ladyfingers soaked in rich espresso, embraced by a velvety mascarpone cheese blend. Topped with a dredge of cocoa powder.

items.name: Scottish Caramel
items.description: A luxurious blend of smooth caramel, made from the finest ingredients, layered with velvety cream and topped with a sprinkle of sea salt for a perfect balance of sweet and salty flavors.

items.name: Chocolate Truffle Pastry
items.description: This exquisite dessert features layers of decadent chocolate sponge cake infused with rich chocolate ganache, topped with a velvety chocolate mousse, and finished with a dusting of cocoa powder.

items.name: New York Cheesecake
items.description: Indulge in the rich, creamy goodness of our New York Cheesecake. Made with a classic cracker crust and velvety smooth cream cheese filling.

items.name: Blueberry Cheesecake
items.description: This delightful dessert is a harmonious blend of creamy, velvety smooth cheesecake on a buttery cracker crust, topped with a vibrant burst of blueberry compote.

items.name: Belgium Chocolate Cheesecake
items.description: Indulge in pure decadence with our Belgium Chocolate Cheesecake. Featuring a velvety smooth filling on a buttery chocolate cookie crust, topped with glossy ganache.
